title: గర్వపడిన గులాబీ మరియు వినయమైన చెట్టు
moral: గర్వం వల్ల నష్టం, వినయం వల్ల లాభం
main_character: The primary character is Gulabi, a beautiful, young, and arrogant rose flower, around 5-7 years old in plant age, with soft pink petals and a slender green stem, wearing a tiny dew drop as a crown, and having a delicate, velvety texture.
setting: A lush green garden on a sunny afternoon with warm, golden lighting and a gentle breeze

scenes.text: ఒక అందమైన ఉద్యానవనంలో గులాబీ పూవు పూచింది. ఆ పూవు చాలా అందంగా ఉంది. దానికి గర్వం వచ్చింది.
scenes.image_prompt: Gulabi is standing tall, spreading her petals wide, and gazing at her reflection in a nearby dew drop with a proud and smug expression, as the warm sunlight highlights her delicate texture and the gentle breeze rustles her petals.

scenes.text: గులాబీ పూవు చుట్టూ ఉన్న ఇతర మొక్కలను చూసి ఎగతాళి చేసింది. వాటిని తక్కువగా చూసింది.
scenes.image_prompt: Gulabi is leaning to one side, looking down at the surrounding plants with a scornful and disdainful expression, as she stretches her stem and petals away from them, with the warm sunlight casting a shadow on the plants she is looking down upon.

scenes.text: ఒక చెట్టు గులాబీ పూవు గర్వాన్ని చూసింది. దానిని హెచ్చరించింది. గర్వం వల్ల నష్టం వస్తుందని చెప్పింది.
scenes.image_prompt: The tree is gently swaying in the breeze, with its branches stretching out towards Gulabi, as it speaks to her in a wise and concerned tone, with the warm sunlight filtering through its leaves and highlighting the texture of its bark.

scenes.text: కానీ గులాబీ పూవు చెట్టు మాటలను పట్టించుకోలేదు. తన గర్వాన్ని మరింత పెంచుకుంది.
scenes.image_prompt: Gulabi is vigorously shaking her head, with her petals fluttering wildly, as she turns away from the tree, with a defiant and stubborn expression, as the gentle breeze turns into a strong gust of wind that blows against her.

scenes.text: ఇంతలో ఒక పెద్ద తుఫాను వచ్చింది. గులాబీ పూవు దాని గర్వం వల్ల నాశనమైపోయింది.
scenes.image_prompt: Gulabi is being blown away by the strong winds, with her petals shredded and scattered, as she desperately tries to hold on to her stem, with a terrified and helpless expression, as the dark storm clouds loom in the background and the winds howl loudly.

scenes.text: చెట్టు మాత్రం తుఫానును తట్టుకుంది. దాని వినయం వల్ల రక్షించబడింది.
scenes.image_prompt: The tree is standing firm, with its roots digging deep into the earth, as it flexes and sways in the strong winds, with a calm and serene expression, as the storm clouds rage around it, but its leaves and branches remain intact.

scenes.text: గులాబీ పూవు తన తప్పును గ్రహించింది. చెట్టు వద్దకు వెళ్లి క్షమాపణ అడిగింది.
scenes.image_prompt: Gulabi is humbly kneeling at the base of the tree, with her petals bowed down, as she looks up at the tree with a remorseful and apologetic expression, as the tree's branches stretch out to comfort her, with the warm sunlight filtering through its leaves and highlighting the texture of its bark.

scenes.text: చెట్టు గులాబీ పూవును క్షమించింది. ఆమెకు మళ్ళీ ప్రాణం పోసింది.
scenes.image_prompt: The tree is gently touching Gulabi's petals with its branches, as it speaks to her in a wise and compassionate tone, with the warm sunlight shining down on them, as Gulabi's petals begin to rebuild and regain their delicate texture and color.
